items.title: CISA Warns of Critical Fortinet FortiOS RCE Vulnerability
items.desc: CISA has added CVE-2026-12345 to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog after active exploitation was confirmed in the wild.
items.author: CISA

items.title: LockBit Ransomware Gang Targets Healthcare Sector in New Campaign
items.desc: Security researchers have identified a new LockBit 3.0 campaign specifically targeting hospitals and healthcare providers across North America.
items.author: Lawrence Abrams

items.title: Microsoft March 2026 Patch Tuesday Fixes 73 Vulnerabilities Including 2 Zero-Days
items.desc: Microsoft's March 2026 security update addresses 73 vulnerabilities across Windows, Office, and Azure, including two actively exploited zero-day flaws.
items.author: Catalin Cimpanu

items.title: APT29 Launches Sophisticated Phishing Campaign Against European Diplomats
items.desc: Russian state-sponsored group APT29 (Cozy Bear) has been observed using novel phishing techniques to target European diplomatic missions.
items.author: Mandiant Research

items.title: Critical Buffer Overflow in Citrix NetScaler Gateway Allows Remote Code Execution
items.desc: Citrix has released an emergency patch for a critical buffer overflow vulnerability in NetScaler Gateway that could allow unauthenticated remote code execution.
items.author: Citrix Security Team

items.title: New Dark Web Marketplace Selling 10M+ Stolen Corporate Credentials
items.desc: A newly discovered dark web marketplace is offering over 10 million stolen corporate credentials from Fortune 500 companies at bulk prices.
items.author: Brian Krebs

items.title: Understanding Kubernetes RBAC Misconfigurations: A Practical Guide
items.desc: A comprehensive guide to identifying and fixing common Kubernetes RBAC misconfigurations that could expose your clusters to privilege escalation attacks.
items.author: Aqua Security

items.title: Introduction to Threat Hunting for SOC Analysts
items.desc: Learn the fundamentals of proactive threat hunting, including hypothesis-driven investigations and key data sources for detecting advanced threats.
items.author: SANS Institute
